text: Here, in this sleek and modern space, I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The institutional chill of glass and steel is met with a playfulness in color and design. I am drawn toward the R+D wall—a celebration of experimentation and possibility. The environment prompts me to contemplate the nature of innovation: it is both structured and free-flowing. Surrounded by evidence of human ingenuity, I sense optimism for progress, even as I remain aware of the complexities that underlie creation.
